scripts.dev: pnpm run dev:check && concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "pnpm run dev:backend" "pnpm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:check: pnpm run setup:env && pnpm run setup:deps
scripts.setup: pnpm run setup:env && pnpm run setup:backend && pnpm run setup:frontend && pnpm run setup:done
scripts.setup:env:
test -f server-go/.env.local || (cp server-go/.env.example server-go/.env.local && echo '
⚠️  Created server-go/.env.local - Please edit your Agora credentials.' && echo '   Required: AGORA_APP_ID and AGORA_APP_CERTIFICATE. Managed provider access must be enabled for this project.
')
scripts.setup:deps: test -d node_modules || (echo 'Installing workspace dependencies...' && pnpm install)
scripts.setup:done:
echo '
✅ Setup complete! Next steps:' && echo '   1. Run: agora project env write server-go/.env.local --with-secrets' && echo '   2. Run: make doctor-local' && echo '   3. Run: make dev
'
scripts.doctor: bash -c 'set -e; echo "Checking shared repo prerequisites..."; command -v pnpm >/dev/null && echo "- pnpm available" || { echo "- pnpm not found"; exit 1; }; test -d node_modules && echo "- workspace dependencies installed" || { echo "- root node_modules missing; run pnpm install"; exit 1; }'
scripts.doctor:local: bash -c 'set -e; pnpm run doctor; command -v go >/dev/null && echo "- go available" || { echo "- go not found"; exit 1; }; GO_VERSION="$(go env GOVERSION | sed "s/^go//")"; case "$GO_VERSION" in 1.23*|1.24*|1.25*|1.26*|2.*) echo "- go version $GO_VERSION" ;; *) echo "- go 1.23 or newer is required; found $GO_VERSION"; exit 1 ;; esac; test -f server-go/.env.local && echo "- server-go/.env.local present" || { echo "- missing server-go/.env.local"; exit 1; }; grep -Eq "^AGORA_APP_ID=.+$" server-go/.env.local && echo "- AGORA_APP_ID configured" || { echo "- AGORA_APP_ID missing in server-go/.env.local"; exit 1; }; grep -Eq "^AGORA_APP_CERTIFICATE=.+$" server-go/.env.local && echo "- AGORA_APP_CERTIFICATE configured" || { echo "- AGORA_APP_CERTIFICATE missing in server-go/.env.local"; exit 1; }'
scripts.build: pnpm run build:backend && pnpm run build:web
scripts.build:backend: mkdir -p server-go/bin server-go/.cache/go-build && cd server-go && GOCACHE=$(pwd)/.cache/go-build go build -o $(pwd)/bin/agent-quickstart-go .
scripts.verify:local: pnpm run doctor:local && pnpm run verify:backend && pnpm run verify:local:go && pnpm run verify:web:proxy && pnpm run verify:web:build
scripts.verify:local:go: cd web-client && GOCACHE=../server-go/.cache/go-build pnpm node --import tsx scripts/verify-local-go.ts
scripts.verify:web: pnpm run doctor && pnpm run verify:web:api && pnpm run verify:web:build
scripts.verify:web:api: cd web-client && pnpm node --import tsx scripts/verify-api-contracts.ts
scripts.verify:web:proxy: cd web-client && pnpm node --import tsx scripts/verify-local-proxy.ts
scripts.clean: pnpm run clean:backend && pnpm run clean:frontend
